title: Good Answer Nephew
about:
Good Answer Nephew is a catchphrase derived from a comedy skit by Micah Dailey-White parodying Family Feud , where a contestant's uncle says, "Good answer, nephew," and applauds after his nephew gets the number one surveyed answer of "Dorito" when asked to "name a Mexican dish that ends with '-ito.'" The skit was uploaded in 2024 and became the subject of memes and content, including animations and lip dubs, between 2024 and 2026.

In October 2025, a reaction image attaching the quote to the character Enjin from the manga series Gachiakuta was popularized on social media. The meme became notably popular in the manga's fandom, inspiring further redraws and edits on sites like TikTok, X and Reddit, including edits that alter the caption and Enjin's facial expression.
origin: On August 15th, 2024, TikToker [1] @micahdaileywhite posted a comedy skit parodying the game show Family Feud . In the skit, Steve Harvey asks the contestant to give him a "Mexican dish that ends with '-ito.'" The contestant answers, "Dorito." His uncle claps and says, "Good answer, nephew," as "Dorito" appears on the board as the number one surveyed answer. The video gained over 6.1 million views in two years.
